name: boilerplate-lp-fullstack
description: Boilerplate de landing page + backend simples (React/Vite/TS + Express/Mongoose/TS).

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix backend
scripts.dev:full: concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,green "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --prefix backend && npm run typecheck --prefix frontend
scripts.test: npm test --prefix backend && npm test --prefix frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix backend && npm run lint --prefix frontend
